name: com.aibridge.unity
description: Let a local AI assistant build your Unity game by talking to it: read the scene and screenshots (incl. UI and the running game), create/modify objects, lay out UGUI, use sprites, author animations, write & compile C#, run Play mode, and more — over a simple file channel. No MCP, no server, no ports.

samples.description: spine.list / spine.instantiate / spine.play commands. Requires the spine-unity runtime to be installed.
